name: Alternative Porcelain
description: The forecast continues. Anonymous systems expand scope and context beyond historical counterparts. Disputes mediated by remote control laboratory experiments. For the underground and upcoming, outcasts and rebels always, great art has an audience. Avant-garde meta-ironic, self-styled gritty, relentless vibrancy—mining of magnetic liminalisms within the Matryoshka village-city. Classic metallic Spanish orange trench coat, printed sheer black tights, decorative near and lower east embroidered textiles with Slavic ‘90s fever, low-key graphic prints.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of three beautiful tanned female model best friends with blue hair, wearing intricately embroidered oversized street wear red coats with buttons and short blue skirts with black printed stockings, walking down the lower east side in the 2000s in early autumn at midnight, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 85, scale: 11.

name: Blue Licorice
description: Heritage motifs pulse through rogue reflections into the evernow of the Empire city. Charmed fragments of textiles collected and created, striped blocks mix with 90° angles, interchangeable bohemian piece work. White sleeveless crop, asymmetrical patchwork decoration of concrete walnut, grayish violet, naive peach pigments, spotted digital prints. High rise uptown cut blue denim jeans, lightly frayed repatched pockets.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model with white hair, wearing high fashion streetwear, a colorful patchwork style sleeveless crop top and boyfriend style jeans, with the busy streets of New York behind her, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: All the Bandwidth You Need
description: Concealed behind an underground handbook for the electronic frontier. True nyms of digital signatures. Wide eyed creators dreaming of ideas and code.  Reflective black bug eyes shades, checkered denim and cotton sleeve jacket, printed cypherdelic tee, ripped cutout slim fit jeans.
graph: a center front view 2012 portrait of a beautiful female wearing high fashion streetwear, blue ripped jeans, patchwork oversized sweatshirt, white cateye sunglasses, a red bandana tying back her hair, underground crowded rune pub at night in the background, highly detailed, dark background, dark alley at night, grunge aesthetic. Sampler: plms, steps: 70, scale: 13.

name: Nectar
description: Eclectic mix of upcycled apparel, off-duty 90s skate culture pieces, decopunk street styles. Miscellaneous moodboards, simulations and simulacra, through an inconspicuous hole-in-the-wall gem. Architecture, sculpture, overloads of texture clash. Ultra-bright centaurea cyanuses bunch freckled on a mango corduroy padded jacket. Mock neck contrast block black and white long sleeve shirt, boyfriend fit jeans, Medusa gray violet and silver rhinestone hair clip.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a floral yellow and blue puffy jacket with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, white blue hair, red lipstick, walking down Manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Cargo
description: Secret cache of vinyl records, wide-eyed reverences, rose tinted glasses. Through T-shirts, tattoos, and time spent on message boards. Kinetic digital obscurity. Bold, retro, thick, round frame lavender lens tinted glasses.
graph: a real life portrait photograph of a beautiful blonde haired tanned runway model posing in vintage 70s streetwear, television sunglasses and red lipstick, shot with a Canon 5D Mark IV, highly realistic, ultra detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 70, scale: 10.

name: Cottagecore Del Rey
description: Limited runs on a beat up Mustang, defined by function, forged through old-fashioned expressions of ridiculous swagger. Automotive home turf. Rich immigrant histories recall dialog in motion, inanimate objects infused with paradox and paradigm. Blazing neon cromalam sneakers, socks. Decorative polychromatic botanic hues, custom mended denim patches, strawberry purse.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a floral yellow and blue puffy jacket with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, white blue hair, red lipstick, walking down Manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Dark Academia
description: Sort through improbably niche inventory racks of an unpretentious collection. Precise encyclopedic organization. Entirely wearable. Sometimes crowded at noon. Royal blue letterman jacket, silver zippers, masked butterfly, locket lady and snake eyes iron on pastel patches. Metallic beaten disk earrings.
graph: a close up center front view 21st century photograph of a beautiful female wearing high fashion streetwear, a red patchwork bomber jacket, blue crystal earrings and a nose piercing, with the busy streets of new york behind her, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Dumbo
description: Rendered from scratch by the system. Perpetually plugged in computer graphics, ultraviolent unmastered versions, immortalized by neo-Gothic suspension. Small exchanges on downtown streets via uncharacteristic self-assurance. The high-low attitude of unofficial tastemakers. Loose light gray ankle-length casual sweatpants, regional patterned oversized blazers, illustrated baggy hoodies and tees, fisherman rib cobalt beanie hats.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of three beautiful tanned female model best friends with blue hair, wearing intricate oversized streetwear blue and green coats with buttons and casual dark gray sweatpants, walking near the brooklyn bridge in the 2000s in early autumn at midnight, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 85, scale: 11.

name: Era
description: Witness to a vanishing world, offstage in front of the lens. Caught here and there in the not so distant silhouette of irrepressible nostalgia. Contrasting fabrics reformulate classics. Sharply tailored, neon tangerine zip up vest, high shine, ultra bright, styled with a bleached white turtleneck drop shoulder sweater, ribbed cuffs and hem, royal cobalt leather a-line mini skirt.
graph: a center front view, wide view, 2015, photograph of a group of beautiful female models jackets and mini skirts, blue lipstick, cute orange purses and walking down manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Figure Graphic
description: Connected attempts to let new forms of knowledge speak. A selective reveal of dangerous outcomes. What does a cypherpunk write? Fuzzy pullover crop mohair crew neck sweater top, feather detailing, puff sleeve gradient descent, suede front mixed print button up skirt, high-top laced sneakers.
graph: a beautiful photograph of a tanned cypherpunk runway model with pink ombre hair wearing high fashion streetwear, knee high black converse, a fuzzy blue hat, a short red skirt and a black crop top, highly detailed. klms, steps: 75, scale: 13.

name: Floral Gold
description: A stable convergence to retro resurgence. American dream on the loose (or Andaluse), IRL. An ode to glamor, credentials established, style nostalgic, 1950s vintage americana. Bouffanted beauty clashes with East Coast polish. Demure floral lace tie bow, frilled papaya mesh mini length dress, electric hoops.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful young 24 year old female model wearing a short red lace dress, pink lipstick, cute green purses, crystal earrings and an orange bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 13.

name: Guipure
description: Pre-programmed choices of a murkier sort overridden by contagious independence. Grace, poise and the elegant mystique of the gypsy contemporary. Will over fate. Lavishly attuned to a delicately layered exotic style. Shimmering silver gemstones scattered amongst teal green bell feathered earrings.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful young 24 year old female model wearing a short red lace dress, pink lipstick, cute green purses, crystal earrings and an orange bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Harper
description: Accurate rendition of self-articulated high skill tendencies. Mythological representations of known events placed into monogrammed fabric. Constructed practice through attitude. Mustard pink lemonade multi-pocket bomber racer jacket, sewed graphic labels and patches.
graph: real life full photograph of a beautiful pink haired tanned 25 year old female posing with luxury fashion streetwear, wearing an oversized Racing Bomber Jacket in Black, captured with a Nikon D7100, high resolution, very detailed, highly realistic. Sampler: klms, steps: 70, scale: 10.

name: Hazey Jupyter
description: The view from Washington Street. Travels between portals defy physics hidden in the urbanscape. Recycled flash of 70s glam rock with Nordic summer style. Psychotropical amethyst micromini skirt balanced with amalgams of prints and embroideries. Cotton cream off the shoulder cardigan, strapless burgundy bandage top. Gold chunky chain necklace.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a tanned female model with copper ombre hair, wearing intricate versace styled off the shoulder streetwear white cardigan with pearl buttons and a tight maroon leopard print mini skirt, silver and gold pins and buttons attached to the skirt, silver belly button piercing, walking near the brooklyn bridge in the 2000s in early autumn at midnight, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 85, scale: 11.

name: Holographic
description: The missing instruction manual for the self-guided unfolds across marks mapped and uncharted. A jetset look for the modern nomad moving between concrete canopies, facing shorter days and longer shadows. Silver earrings stir kaleidoscopic color, blends of subtle stones, rhinestones, metal undertones. Bold bomber jacket, sleeves patchworked with distinct textiles.
graph: a close up center front view 21st century photograph of a beautiful female wearing high fashion streetwear, a red patchwork bomber jacket, blue crystal earrings and a nose piercing, with the busy streets of new york behind her, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Intrepid Beauty
description: Radiant decadence and sophistication. Motifs once whimsical lost to hellenic philosophies of inquiry and eventual science. Libraries neverending in knowledge of thematic courage. Translucent kunzite gemstone hooped earrings. Curved ruffle hem scarlet halter top, ruby red pendant.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful young 24 year old female model wearing a red lace dress, pink lipstick, crystal earrings and an orange bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Jatnna
description: An impression of words and syntax, reminiscent of the natural language system of glyphs. A dream transcribed. Deformed with intention, enticing in its recognition. Worlds assembled through functional text. Blue washed crop denim jacket, saffron yellow draped knot long sleeve shirt, soft wool beret, translucent sparkling glass art earrings.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful female model wearing a yellow jacket, mini skirt, blue lipstick, cute yellow purses, crystal earrings and a bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 70, scale: 10.

name: Levels Unlocked
description: Neon-lit aetherpunk streets race with motivational variety. Rebellious factions scientifically harnessed. The surreal quality of cyberpunk expeditions, layered imperfect balances. Padded, quilted sleeve, black leather motorcycle jacket, silver-toned metal zips and stud details, zip-up closure, academia orange digicore patchwork.
graph: a beautiful photograph of a !tanned !!female !!cypherpunk !runway !!!model in the streets of the !!Lower !!East !!Side at !!night, !!wearing !!high !!fashion !!!streetwear, with a black collar orange leather jacket, shot with a Canon 5D Mark IV, highly !!!detailed, highly !!!realistic. Sampler: klms, steps: 100, scale: 15.

name: Loisaida
description: Anchored to a complex past, a neighborhood embeds ambiguous heritage with venerable accents. An underground extension of deep influences. Self expressed ensembles evoke rainbowic tones. Ruby reds, feverish azures, saturated rouges, filigree gold embroidery. Solid over the knee socks trimmed by large buttoned coats, funky mini dresses and old shirts revamped.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of three beautiful tanned female model best friends with blue hair, wearing intricately embroidered oversized street wear red coats with buttons and short blue skirts with black printed stockings, walking down the lower east side in the 2000s in early autumn at midnight, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 85, scale: 11.

name: Madrina
description: Younger vision of augmented takes, street lore and signature DIY fashion brutalism. Questions of old world charm, nuances of natively emergent acts, critical engagement. It’s the same story. Sky blue washed above the knee denim skirt, raw hemline, distressed detail. Floral motif puffed bomber jacket, exaggerated blooming rose embroidery, soft asymmetrical swirl print sleeve cuffs, knee high chunky red-striped blue socks.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a floral yellow and blue puffy jacket with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, white blue hair, red lipstick, walking down Manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Monday Morning
description: Culture of a lightning rod, appreciated on its own terms. Studious contemporary, with worn influences on thrifted sleeves. A shabby New York un-encumbrance of faux-opulence. Puff sleeve turndown collar high waist pleated neon skirt, two piece blazer set. Beaten silver choker necklace, crystal layered sequined clutch dosed in a deep shade of light steel blue.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful young 24 year old female model wearing knee high pink wedge boots, blue crystal purses, orange leather skirt, walking down manhattan in the late 1980s. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Montaigne
description: Clued up on cast-iron architecture, Belgian block pavement, sweeping galleries and textile manufacturing city workshops. Available for industrial development, garment production, pattern engineering. Traditional floral print puffer jacket, exaggerated high collar and long sleeves. Short eggshell blue denim skirt, violet couture round neck long sleeve bodysuit.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a detailed red floral printed purple and red puffy jacket, with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, bright orange socks, blue hair, red lipstick, walking down manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: New Edit
description: Within the postindustrial, a rediscovery of otherness and elsewheres. Concerned global citizens for urban survival. Personal narratives oscillate on the periphery of status and official outsider capacity. Styled button up, straight line cut, rain slicker trench coats, softly faded pencil skirts, dark printed tights.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of three beautiful tanned female model best friends with blue hair, wearing intricate versace styled oversized streetwear blue and green coats with buttons and casual dark gray sweatpants, walking near the brooklyn bridge in the 2000s in early autumn at midnight, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 85, scale: 11.

name: Penélopé
description: Mesmerized by the effortless elegance of a magical city— warm, rich, immersive, foreign. Beneath loud, bright surfaces, an understated sophistication. Thoroughly modern atmosphere matches woolen, cherry wine crimson, crochet berets and cottagecore cardigans, with subtle bobble stitch borders.

name: Reformulated
description: A virtual extension through the accelerating lexicon. Between the real and hyperreal an unwitting simulacrum, a deliberate distraction within rude awakenings. Seduced by the allure of the blue light glow. Delectable style. Vibrant shades of burnt orange, reflective black, multi-layer thick gold chain curb link chokers. A loose cotton strapless crop top, geometric bandana and ultra high waisted leather ruffle mini skirt.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model a short black leather skirt, with a red spotted bandana tying back her hair, black high top sneakers, bright orange socks, red lipstick, walking down manhattan in the 2000s in early autumn, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 75, scale: 13.

name: Row Delta
description: Faced with disguised time zones, supernatural alleys and monsters hidden in tagged side streets. Black boots, black skirt, patterned tights and an oversized patchwork decorated racing bomber jacket. In pre-loved condition, mixed shades of red, white and blue printed emblems stand as hand me downs from the last decade.
graph: real life full photograph of a group of beautiful tanned 25 year old females posing with luxury fashion streetwear, wearing oversized racing Bomber jacket in black, navy and red, with white and black hair, captured with a Olympus E-M10 III, high resolution, very detailed, highly realistic, new york city and paris vibes. Sampler: klms, steps: 70, scale: 10.

name: Sampic Vintage
description: Out into the boroughs, neo-Renaissance style, with American textile industry decorative mementos. A strategic maneuver for market distribution. The movement of materials and clothing, in and out, of high-rise factories and low slung streets. Design, cut and sell. Oversized neon orange drawstring hoodie, floral velour bomber jacket, frayed hem dark wash skirt, black cotton thigh high stockings.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a detailed red floral printed purple and red puffy jacket, with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, bright orange socks, blue hair, red lipstick, walking down manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Slight Renaissance
description: A researched inventory of lesser-known mechanical marvels intertwines vintage embellishment in full manifest. Messy eccentricities of pre-owned items. Imminently wearable, entirely transformative. Casual pistachio panel lace floral printed cami top, wrap around tie-waist red lace skirt, silky sheen pearl pendant.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful young 24 year old female model wearing a red lace dress, pink lipstick, cute green purses, crystal earrings and an orange bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Stereo Flower
description: The map is a pattern. The blueprint to a functional garment, a complex configuration applies mathematical knowhow. Packing problems posed by aesthetic properties. Asymmetric denim bodycon dress, fitted tank straps, contrast topstitching, bright bumblebee yellow tee, puffed epoch print jacket, ribbed material cuffs.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a detailed red floral printed yellow and blue puffy jacket, with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, bright yellow socks, blue hair, red lipstick, walking down manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Sunshine on Her Mind
description: Tilt-shift into an endless wardrobe, with eyes on another realm. Formed through boutique CNC manufacturing for an occasion not exactly unforeseen. These shades of cool conceal cinematic potential within a new oval look, statement crystal earrings and headscarf covered with Post–Mughal Empire visions of minimal ornamentalism.
graph: a center front view, close up, 2020, photograph of a beautiful female model wearing a yellow jacket, mini skirt, blue lipstick, cute yellow purses, crystal earrings and a bandana, walking down Manhattan in the 1990s, highly detailed. Sampler: klms, steps: 70, scale: 10.

name: The Various Chances
description: Unique relationships with realities. Where’s the potion that can make you shrink? How curious the pursuit of an irrational idea. Mad tea parties, painted roses. Knit hoodie crop denim coat, hand painted garden of live flowers, crystal embellished detail. Red crew neck tee. Straight leg denim jeans.
graph: a center front view portrait, 2012, photograph of a beautiful tanned female model wearing a detailed red floral printed yellow and blue puffy jacket, with a ripped denim miniskirt, black high top sneakers, bright yellow socks, blue hair, red lipstick, walking down manhattan in the 2000s, highly detailed. Sampler: plms, steps: 75, scale: 11.

name: Untitled
description: At odds with digital cash protocols. Good metaphors for visual synthetic semantics. Control of keys, provable removals, operational callbacks. Machines unstoppable, doing 75 down the freeway. Wide black velvet choker, ruched corset top pair. Chunky ruthenium digicore collar necklace.
